original_abstract: This study aims to integrate Islamic Education values into the Strengthening Pancasila Student Profile and Work Culture Project (P5BK) to shape student character at SMKN 1 Masbagik. The research employs a qualitative descriptive method. Data were collected through interviews, observations, and document studies, and then analyzed using Miles and Huberman's interactive model. The results show that the integration of P5BK with Islamic Education values at SMKN 1 Masbagik is implemented through projects with themes of sustainable lifestyle, employability, and local wisdom. The implementation of P5BK involves four stages: planning, execution, evaluation, and supportive factors. The advantages of this integration include flexibility in implementation, synergy with the community and the workforce, and providing real-world experiences to foster student awareness of their environment and surrounding community. The theoretical implication of this research is its contribution to the support and enhancement of P5BK learning as part of the independent learning curriculum, which can improve teacher competence and the quality of education in vocational schools.
humanized_abstract: The purpose of this study was to address the problem of how to make Islamic Education values combined to the Strengthening Pancasila Student Profile and Work Culture Project (P5BK) become more effective in building student character at SMKN 1 Masbagik. The research method used in this study was qualitative descriptive. The data collection is done by interviewing, observing and by analyzing documents through the Miles and Huberman interactive model. The results of this study indicate that P5BK combined with Islamic Education values at SMKN 1 Masbagik is carried out by applying projects related to several sustainable lifestyle competencies, employability, and local wisdom. The implementation of P5BK consists of several stages, namely; the stage of planning, the stage of action, the stage of evaluation and the stage of supporting factors. In addition, according to the results of the study, the advantages that exist in this P5BK implementation are including: 1) flexibility; 2) relevance between school and community, and between school and work place; and 3) in increasing student awareness for its environment and the surrounding community. This research contributes to the theoretical aspect, including to support and increase students' comprehension in learning P5BK as one of the material in the implementation of independent learning curriculum which is expected to improve teacher competence and education quality in vocational schools.
